message:
Close bd-3uw: Add --lines flag for range processing

Implemented the --lines/-L CLI flag for selective line range processing:
- LineRange struct with start/end fields (1-indexed, inclusive)
- Support for range formats: "10-50", "50-", "-100", "42"
- Multiple comma-separated ranges with automatic merging
- Block filtering to only process diagrams within specified ranges
- Comprehensive unit tests for parsing and range behavior

All 234 tests passing (207 unit + 27 integration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
